title: Cisco Trunking & DTP
description: Learn how to configure 802.1Q trunk ports, control allowed VLANs, set native VLANs, disable DTP negotiation, and verify trunk status.

tasks.explanation: Trunk configuration and verification commands require Privileged EXEC mode.

tasks.hint: Use the command: 'configure terminal' or 'conf t'
tasks.explanation: Trunk parameters are configured from global configuration mode by entering the interface.

tasks.prompt: Enter Interface Configuration mode for GigabitEthernet0/1.
tasks.hint: Use the command: 'interface GigabitEthernet0/1' or 'int gi0/1'
tasks.explanation: Trunk links are typically configured on uplink ports between switches.

tasks.prompt: Configure the interface as an 802.1Q trunk port.
tasks.explanation: Trunk mode allows the port to carry tagged traffic for multiple VLANs simultaneously.

tasks.prompt: Restrict the trunk to carry only VLANs 10 and 20.
tasks.hint: Use the command: 'switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20'
tasks.explanation: Limiting allowed VLANs reduces unnecessary broadcast traffic and improves security on trunk links.

tasks.prompt: Set the native VLAN on this trunk to VLAN 99.
tasks.hint: Use the command: 'switchport trunk native vlan 99'
tasks.explanation: The native VLAN carries untagged traffic across the trunk. Both ends of the link must agree on the native VLAN.

tasks.prompt: Disable DTP negotiation on this trunk port.
tasks.explanation: Disabling DTP prevents the port from dynamically negotiating trunk or access mode with the neighbor switch.

tasks.prompt: Enter Interface Configuration mode for FastEthernet0/23 through FastEthernet0/24 simultaneously.
tasks.explanation: 'interface range' lets you apply configuration to multiple ports at once, saving time on large deployments.

tasks.prompt: Configure the interfaces to dynamically negotiate trunking using DTP desirable mode.
tasks.hint: Use the command: 'switchport mode dynamic desirable'
tasks.explanation: Dynamic desirable actively attempts to form a trunk with the neighbor. If the neighbor is set to auto or desirable, a trunk forms.

tasks.prompt: Display the status of all trunk ports on the switch.
tasks.explanation: 'show interfaces trunk' confirms mode, encapsulation, native VLAN, and allowed VLANs for every active trunk.
